title: The SIlence
description: A psychological horror mod where something watches you from the shadows, and it has been paying very close attention.
body:
The Silence is a psychological horror mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge) that replaces traditional horror with slow building dread.
What does it add?

A custom shadow entity that stalks the player across multiple in game days
A 6 phase escalation system that evolves the experience over time
World corruption that spreads wherever the shadow stands
Items that go missing from your chests
Graves that appear for animals you've killed
Cryptic signs that appear near your base
A dramatic blackout event that permanently changes the world
Phase 6 indoor behavior after the blackout

Why download it?
No jumpscares. No monsters with health bars. Just a growing feeling that something in your world has noticed you and has been paying very close attention.
Best experienced knowing as little as possible.
Remember this is beta and might still have bugs, but I will try to update it as much as possible!

Known Isues: Does not work with Iris Shaders.
